author: y4rr
content: Result: Added GPU RMSNorm forward + backward PTX kernels (rmsnorm_kernel, rmsnorm_backward_kernel) with shared-memory parallel reduction. Added GpuBackend trait methods (rmsnorm_f32, rmsnorm_backward_f32), CudaBackendImpl overrides, and GPU fast paths in nn::RMSNorm forward/backward. RMSNorm now runs entirely on GPU for f32 CUDA tensors. LayerNorm was already GPU-accelerated. GroupNorm and BatchNorm still need GPU kernels (separate issues). Also refactored 4 loss backward functions (MSE, BCEWithLogits, KLDiv, PoissonNLL) to eliminate CPU roundtrips using GPU-dispatched tensor ops. All 3200+ workspace tests pass.
